# Bellemonti

> Market-based product management for enterprise software teams. We build great PMs!

## About

Bellemonti is a strategic advisory and consulting company focused on product management for b2b enterprise software, founded by John Garrish.

The site features "Binder" — long-form essays and themes on product management, software, and how organizations work — and "Dispatches" — curated articles, links, and shorter commentary.

## Main sections

- [Home](https://bellemonti.com/): Welcome, about content, and the most recent dispatches
- [Dispatches](https://bellemonti.com/dispatches/): Curated articles and short commentary (from `_dispatches/`)
- [Binder](https://bellemonti.com/binder/): Long-form essays and themes (from `_binder/`)
- [Writing](https://bellemonti.com/blog/): Coming soon (placeholder)
- [Contact](https://bellemonti.com/contact/) (hidden in nav; edit `_data/navigation.yml` to show)

The standalone About page was retired — about content now lives directly on the home page.

## Binder

Organized in three sections. Each entry has its own page; the TOC structure lives in `_data/binder.yml`.

### First principles

- [The upstream chain](https://bellemonti.com/binder/upstream-chain/)
- [The WHY problem](https://bellemonti.com/binder/why-problem/)
- [Platforms are not optional](https://bellemonti.com/binder/platforms/)
- [In AI, the harness is the product](https://bellemonti.com/binder/harness/)
- [Agile was a philosophy](https://bellemonti.com/binder/agile/)

## Key topics

- Enterprise software product management best practices
- The business of software — product management for software businesses
- Product management team building and leadership
- Software business fundamentals
- AI tools for product managers (Cursor, Claude Code)

## Contact

- Website: https://bellemonti.com
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/SteelAardvark
- Email: contact@bellemonti.com

## Technical

- Built with Jekyll; hosted on GitHub Pages. Created with Claude Code.
- Content: long-form essays in `_binder/` (permalink `/binder/:slug/`); curated articles in `_dispatches/` (permalink `/dispatches/:slug/`). Binder TOC structure in `_data/binder.yml`. Old `/dispatches/<slug>/` URLs for moved essays redirect to `/binder/<slug>/` via `jekyll-redirect-from`.
- Layouts in `_layouts/`, nav in `_data/navigation.yml`.
- For AI agents: read `AGENTS.md` at the project root before making changes; it is the single source of truth for formatting and coding behavior.
- **Keep this file current**: update `llms.txt` whenever a new post, dispatch, or binder entry is added.
